filters.searchReports: Search report content or series ID

dashboard.title: Board decision center
dashboard.description: Review evidence, vote on decisions, approve commercial workflows and arbitrate publication risks.
dashboard.liveDataError: Live dashboard data is temporarily unavailable. The workflow shortcuts remain available.
dashboard.emptyPending: No active decision currently requires your attention.
dashboard.unranked: Not ranked in the latest period

sections.sessions: Review sessions assigned to you and their agenda.
sections.decisions: Inspect active decisions and cast your Board vote.
sections.reports: Read editorial analysis prepared for the Board.
sections.contracts: Approve, request changes and sign contracts or amendments.
sections.deadlines: Resolve deadline disputes that affect publication slots.
sections.rankings: Review internal ranking signals and at-risk series.
sections.transfers: Screen transfer requests and sign transfer agreements.
sections.audit: Trace business state changes and system actions.
sections.profile: Maintain specialties used for session assignment.

sessions.title: Board sessions
sessions.description: View upcoming, active and concluded sessions.
sessions.emptyChat: No messages have been sent in this session.

chatErrors.NOT_PARTICIPANT: You are not a participant in this session.
chatErrors.SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE: Chat is only available while the session is active.
chatErrors.VOTING_PHASE: Chat is locked because voting has started.
chatErrors.INVALID_INPUT: The message must contain between 1 and 1000 characters.
chatErrors.DISCONNECTED: The live connection is unavailable. Please reconnect and try again.
chatErrors.TIMEOUT: The server did not acknowledge the message in time.
chatErrors.UNKNOWN: The message could not be sent. Please try again.

realtime.disconnected: Live connection unavailable; periodic refresh remains active

decisions.title: Board decisions
decisions.description: Review proposals and vote on decisions assigned to your session.
decisions.voteConfirmation: Review your choice carefully. Each member can vote only once for this decision.

voteUnavailable.closed: The decision was finalized according to the quorum and full-roster majority rules.
voteUnavailable.alreadyVoted: You have already voted on this decision.
voteUnavailable.notInRoster: You are not assigned to this session roster.
voteUnavailable.sessionNotActive: Voting is only available while the session is active.
voteUnavailable.votingNotOpen: The session creator has not opened the voting phase yet.

decisions.finalizedSessionHint: The session is still active in the {{phase}} phase. Voting is locked; the session creator must conclude the meeting to move its status to Concluded.

reports.title: Board reports
reports.description: Read evidence and editorial analysis attached to decisions.

contracts.title: Contract review
contracts.description: Approve negotiated terms, sign agreements and review amendments.
contracts.partialLoadError: Some contract details could not be loaded. Empty sections below may not reflect the latest data.
contracts.emptyVersions: No prior contract versions are available.
contracts.changeReasonDescription: Describe the terms the Editor should review and update.
contracts.changeReasonPlaceholder: For example: clarify the ownership split and termination terms.
contracts.readyToSign: Mangaka has signed. Complete the Board signature with an OTP.
contracts.waitingMangakaSignature: Available after the contract is approved and Mangaka has signed.
contracts.otpInstruction: Request an OTP, then enter the six-digit code to confirm the signature.
contracts.paymentWorkflowDescription: Review contract payouts or report periodic revenue when the contract is eligible.

payments.title: Payment approval
payments.description: Approve triggered payouts, record payment references or cancel invalid records.

deadlines.title: Deadline arbitration
deadlines.description: Resolve escalated deadline requests and publication-slot conflicts.
deadlines.empty: No Board-review deadline requests were found.

rankings.title: Board ranking overview
rankings.description: Review internal risk signals for a reflected survey period.
rankings.empty: No ranking data is available for this period.

reprints.title: Reprint workflow
reprints.description: Review and approve reprint requests under the ownership rules.
reprints.waitingMangaka: This request uses a revenue-share contract and is waiting for Mangaka approval.

transfers.title: Series transfer screening
transfers.description: Screen transfer candidates, execute full buyouts and sign transfer contracts.
transfers.empty: No transfer requests await Board review.
transfers.signInstruction: Enter the transfer contract ID and confirm the signature with an OTP.

profile.title: Board member profile
profile.description: Your specialties are used when forming an appropriate Board roster.

audit.title: Audit history
audit.description: Review business transitions and actions relevant to Board oversight.
